title: White Satin Ribbon 'in Loving Memory' Red 5cm/2 inches x 45m/50yards
features: Bold In Loving Memory motif printed in red
description: A white satin ribbon with a bold In Loving Memory motif printed in red. 5cm/2 inches wide on a 45m/50 yard roll. The length of the printed motif plus the space between is approximately 29cm/11.5 inches. A quality florists' memorial ribbon. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings.
